mentions.note: DuPont spinoff making specialized semiconductor materials; rallied 30% (March 30-April 23); trimmed by charitable trust due to rapid move.

Infrastructure/engineering company; great company, surprisingly low, but market sees it as expensive vs. Quanta and others; can't command multiple. Caller Joe (NJ) bought 1/3 position, asked to continue—Cramer said hold/not pushback but market won't help.
